variants: Reagan Fitzwilliam currently resides in Rockwren Courtyard, where he continues to explore the intricacies of magical tools. He was born in Magnolia Spire and has earned significant recognition within the Youngblood Adventurers Council. His published work, the Icefiber Calibration Record, has become an authoritative source among adventurers. For his outstanding contributions to the field, he was awarded the Arcane Compass Distinction. Reagan's passion for innovation drives his engagement with both seasoned and aspiring adventurers in the community.
